requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Label — Ministry of Electricity Programme
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签 —— 电力部计划
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤 —— 電力部計畫

summary.en: Egypt's Ministry of Electricity and Renewable Energy oversees energy efficiency labelling programmes for electrical equipment including industrial motors. Motors within programme scope may require an energy efficiency label indicating the IE class. Programme details, mandatory scope, and label format are issued by the Ministry and may be updated by ministerial decree. ESQ mark (via EOS) and energy efficiency label (via Ministry of Electricity) are separate obligations that may both apply. verified: false — confirm current programme scope and label requirements with the Ministry of Electricity.
summary.zh: 埃及电力与可再生能源部负责监管电气设备（包括工业电机）的能效标签计划。纳入计划范围的电机可能须附加注明 IE 等级的能效标签。计划详情、强制范围及标签格式由该部发布，可能通过部长令更新。ESQ 标志（通过 EOS）和能效标签（通过电力部）是两项可能同时适用的独立义务。verified: false —— 请向电力部确认现行计划范围及标签要求。
summary.zht: 埃及電力與可再生能源部負責監管電氣設備（包括工業電機）的能效標籤計畫。納入計畫範圍的電機可能須附加注明 IE 等級的能效標籤。計畫詳情、強制範圍及標籤格式由該部發布，可能通過部長令更新。ESQ 標誌（通過 EOS）和能效標籤（通過電力部）是兩項可能同時適用的獨立義務。verified: false —— 請向電力部確認現行計畫範圍及標籤要求。

standards_or_laws: Egyptian Ministry of Electricity and Renewable Energy energy efficiency programme

summary.en: China uses the Compulsory Energy Efficiency Label (中国能效标识) under the Energy Conservation Law and Regulation on Energy Efficiency Label (2016 revision). Motors covered by GB 18613-2020 must carry the energy efficiency label showing the grade (IE1–IE3 or equivalent). The label is administered by SAMR and NDRC.
summary.zh: 中国依据《节能法》及《能源效率标识管理办法》（2016年修订版）实施强制能效标识制度。纳入 GB 18613-2020 范围的电机须张贴显示能效等级（IE1–IE3 或相当）的能效标识，由国家市场监督管理总局和国家发展改革委负责管理。
summary.zht: 中國依據《節能法》及《能源效率標識管理辦法》（2016年修訂版）實施強制能效標識制度。納入 GB 18613-2020 範圍的電機須張貼顯示能效等級（IE1–IE3 或相當）的能效標識，由國家市場監督管理總局和國家發展改革委負責管理。

standards_or_laws: Regulation on Energy Efficiency Label (China, 2016 revision)

gap.en: China's energy efficiency label (中国能效标识) is not recognised in Egypt. Exporters must comply with Egypt's Ministry of Electricity programme requirements separately. The label format, IE class threshold, and administrative process differ between the two countries.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识在埃及不被认可。出口方须另行遵守埃及电力部能效计划要求。两国的标签格式、IE 等级门槛及行政流程均有所不同。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識在埃及不被認可。出口方須另行遵守埃及電力部能效計畫要求。兩國的標籤格式、IE 等級門檻及行政流程均有所不同。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for motors within Ministry of Electricity programme scope — verify current scope
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — compulsory energy efficiency label under SAMR / NDRC for motors covered by GB 18613-2020

source.publisher: Egyptian Ministry of Electricity and Renewable Energy

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China's compulsory energy efficiency label does not substitute for Egypt's Ministry of Electricity programme label requirements. Exporters should confirm current label obligations with the Ministry of Electricity before shipment. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国强制能效标识不能替代埃及电力部能效计划的标签要求。出口方应在发货前向电力部确认现行标签义务。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國強制能效標識不能替代埃及電力部能效計畫的標籤要求。出口方應在發貨前向電力部確認現行標籤義務。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Voltage and Frequency Compatibility (380 V / 50 Hz)
requirement_topic.zh: 电压与频率兼容性（380 V / 50 Hz）
requirement_topic.zht: 電壓與頻率相容性（380 V / 50 Hz）

summary.en: Egypt operates a 380/220 V (3-phase / single-phase), 50 Hz grid — the same nominal voltage and frequency as mainland China. Industrial motors rated for the China grid (380 V, 50 Hz, 3-phase) are therefore electrically compatible with the Egyptian grid without voltage or frequency conversion. Wiring and installation must comply with Egyptian electrical installation standards and local utility connection requirements.
summary.zh: 埃及电网为 380/220 V（三相/单相）、50 Hz，与中国大陆标称电压和频率相同。按中国电网（380 V、50 Hz、三相）额定的工业电机在电气上与埃及电网兼容，无需电压或频率转换。布线及安装须符合埃及电气安装标准及当地电力公司并网要求。
summary.zht: 埃及電網為 380/220 V（三相/單相）、50 Hz，與中國大陸標稱電壓和頻率相同。按中國電網（380 V、50 Hz、三相）額定的工業電機在電氣上與埃及電網相容，無需電壓或頻率轉換。佈線及安裝須符合埃及電氣安裝標準及當地電力公司並網要求。

summary.en: China's standard industrial grid is 380 V (3-phase), 50 Hz. Motors manufactured for the Chinese domestic market are rated at 380 V / 50 Hz by default. GB 12665 covers motor cooling and climatic suitability. GB/T 755 (equivalent to IEC 60034-1) covers motor ratings.
summary.zh: 中国标准工业电网为 380 V（三相）、50 Hz。为国内市场生产的电机默认额定为 380 V / 50 Hz。GB 12665 涵盖电机冷却与气候适用性，GB/T 755（等效于 IEC 60034-1）涵盖电机额定值。
summary.zht: 中國標準工業電網為 380 V（三相）、50 Hz。為國內市場生產的電機預設額定為 380 V / 50 Hz。GB 12665 涵蓋電機冷卻與氣候適用性，GB/T 755（等效於 IEC 60034-1）涵蓋電機額定值。

gap.en: No voltage or frequency gap exists between China and Egypt for standard 3-phase industrial motors (both 380 V / 50 Hz). This eliminates a common export barrier. Remaining gaps relate to conformity marking (ESQ / GOEIC), not electrical compatibility.
gap.zh: 标准三相工业电机在中国与埃及之间不存在电压或频率差距（均为 380 V / 50 Hz），消除了常见的出口障碍。剩余差距与符合性标志（ESQ / GOEIC）有关，而非电气兼容性。
gap.zht: 標準三相工業電機在中國與埃及之間不存在電壓或頻率差距（均為 380 V / 50 Hz），消除了常見的出口障礙。剩餘差距與符合性標誌（ESQ / GOEIC）有關，而非電氣相容性。

mandatory_status.target: No conversion requirement — voltage and frequency match
mandatory_status.cn: No conversion requirement — voltage and frequency match

source.publisher: Egyptian Ministry of Electricity and Renewable Energy

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Standard Chinese 380 V / 50 Hz 3-phase industrial motors are electrically compatible with the Egyptian grid and require no voltage or frequency conversion. Exporters should still verify nameplate ratings and installation requirements with local engineers. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 标准中国 380 V / 50 Hz 三相工业电机与埃及电网在电气上兼容，无需电压或频率转换。出口方仍应与当地工程师核验铭牌额定值及安装要求。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 標準中國 380 V / 50 Hz 三相工業電機與埃及電網在電氣上相容，無需電壓或頻率轉換。出口方仍應與當地工程師核驗銘牌額定值及安裝要求。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.zh: 电动机铭牌及文件语言
requirement_topic.zht: 電動機銘牌及文件語言

summary.en: EOS and GOEIC require that product documentation and labelling submitted for ESQ mark application and import conformity clearance be in Arabic or accompanied by a certified Arabic translation. Technical documentation supporting the ESQ mark — including test reports, efficiency data, and user manuals — must be accessible to Egyptian conformity assessors. verified: false — confirm language and documentation requirements directly with EOS and GOEIC.
summary.zh: EOS 和 GOEIC 要求提交 ESQ 标志申请及进口符合性通关的产品文件和标签使用阿拉伯语，或附有经认证的阿拉伯语译文。支持 ESQ 标志的技术文件（包括测试报告、能效数据和用户手册）须可供埃及符合性评估人员查阅。verified: false —— 请直接向 EOS 和 GOEIC 确认语言及文件要求。
summary.zht: EOS 和 GOEIC 要求提交 ESQ 標誌申請及進口符合性通關的產品文件和標籤使用阿拉伯語，或附有經認證的阿拉伯語譯文。支持 ESQ 標誌的技術文件（包括測試報告、能效數據和使用手冊）須可供埃及符合性評估人員查閱。verified: false —— 請直接向 EOS 和 GOEIC 確認語言及文件要求。

summary.en: Chinese motors are typically supplied with Chinese-language documentation, manuals, and nameplates for the domestic market. Export versions may include English documentation. Arabic documentation is not standard for Chinese domestic-market products.
summary.zh: 中国电机通常随附中文文件、手册和铭牌（面向国内市场）。出口版本可能包含英文文件，但阿拉伯语文件并非中国国内市场产品的标准配置。
summary.zht: 中國電機通常隨附中文文件、手冊和銘牌（面向國內市場）。出口版本可能包含英文文件，但阿拉伯語文件並非中國國內市場產品的標準配置。

gap.en: Chinese motors are typically documented in Chinese or English. Egypt requires Arabic-language documentation or certified Arabic translations for ESQ mark application and GOEIC clearance. Exporters must arrange Arabic translation and certification before applying for EOS / GOEIC approval.
gap.zh: 中国电机通常使用中文或英文记录。埃及要求 ESQ 标志申请和 GOEIC 通关提供阿拉伯语文件或经认证的阿拉伯语译文。出口方须在申请 EOS / GOEIC 批准前安排阿拉伯语翻译及认证。
gap.zht: 中國電機通常使用中文或英文記錄。埃及要求 ESQ 標誌申請和 GOEIC 通關提供阿拉伯語文件或經認證的阿拉伯語譯文。出口方須在申請 EOS / GOEIC 批准前安排阿拉伯語翻譯及認證。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for EOS ESQ application and GOEIC clearance — Arabic language or certified translation required
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — domestic requirement is Chinese language

source.publisher: General Organisation for Export and Import Control (GOEIC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese-language-only documentation is insufficient for Egypt EOS ESQ mark application and GOEIC import clearance. Exporters must prepare Arabic-language documentation or certified Arabic translations. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 纯中文文件不足以满足埃及 EOS ESQ 标志申请和 GOEIC 进口通关要求。出口方须准备阿拉伯语文件或经认证的阿拉伯语译文。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 純中文文件不足以滿足埃及 EOS ESQ 標誌申請和 GOEIC 進口通關要求。出口方須準備阿拉伯語文件或經認證的阿拉伯語譯文。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
